blocks.text: 📌 Project Overviewb

Harmonize HQ is a chat-based HR platformb designed to create a fun and collaborativeb workplace by streamlining employee onboardingb. Early-stage startups often struggle with standardized onboardingb due to rapid team changes, evolving job roles, and a lack of structured processes. To solve this, I led the development of an MVP onboarding automation toolb, ensuring consistency, efficiency, and scalabilityb for growing startups.
🔹 Problem (The Challenge)b
💡 Startups struggle with scalable onboarding solutionsb
Rapid role & team changesb make structured onboarding difficult.
Existing onboarding systems are rigid and not adaptableb for startups.
Inefficient manual processesb lead to missed steps and inconsistent experiencesb.
🔹 Solution & Execution (My Role & Impact)b
As Lead Product Managerb, I led 0→1 product developmentb, cross-functional team hiringb, and user researchb to develop an automated, standardized onboarding solutionb.
✅ Product Strategy & MVP Development:b
Designed an automated onboarding toolb with role-specific templatesb for flexibility.
Integrated an email scheduler for personalized communicationb, reducing manual effort.
Focused on driving product adoptionb across Harmonize's HR suiteb.
✅ User Research & Iteration:b
Conducted 20+ usability interviewsb to refine product positioning based on real user pain pointsb.
Iterated using data-driven design featuresb that prioritized usability over "nice-to-haves"b.
✅ Business & Revenue Impact:b
Developed a growth strategyb to convert free users into paid product adoptionb.
Used scrappy experimentationb to test and validate feature effectiveness before full rollout.
🔹 Results & Impactb
📈 Product Adoption & Engagement:b
Increased startup adoptionb of the MVP, driving broader HR suite engagementb.
Boosted outreach response rates from 10% to 35%b through refined product positioningb.
💰 Revenue Growth & Efficiency Gains:b
Increased monthly recurring revenue by 7%b by driving free users to paid productsb.
Reduced onboarding timeb and improved completion ratesb for new hires.
📊 Key Metrics Measured:b
Total # of candidates onboardedb → Tracked user engagement & adoption.
% of onboarding completedb → Measured process efficiency.
Time to onboarding completionb → Reduced inefficiencies in workflow.
# of startups using Harmonize MVP & other productsb → Quantified product stickiness.
🔹 Key Learnings & Takeawaysb
🚀 0→1 Product Development:b Drove MVP from concept to launchb, requiring rapid iterations, experimentation, and cross-team alignmentb.
📊 Data-Driven Decision Making:b Applied A/B testing, user feedback, and analyticsb to prioritize features that directly solved user pain points.
🤝 Process Standardization & Communication:b Established Scrum methodologies, JIRA workflows, and Slack-based communicationb to keep teams aligned.
